name: aetheria
description: Order, Healing, and Light. The architecture of the Pearl Throne.

templates.name: The Pearl Gateway
templates.description: A massive archway of polished white stone, inlaid with golden filigree. It hums with protective energy.

templates.name: Golden Sun-Plaza
templates.description: A wide plaza paved with reflective stones that glow in the sunlight. A central fountain of clear water provides a sense of peace.

templates.name: Altar of Perpetual Light
templates.description: A raised platform holding a pillar of pure, solid light. The air here is warm and smells of incense and ozone.

templates.name: Ivory Lookout
templates.description: A tall, slender tower made of ivory-colored brick. From here, the entire kingdom is visible under the watchful eye of Valeros.

templates.name: The Pearl Archives
templates.description: Floor-to-ceiling shelves of white oak are filled with leather-bound volumes and pristine scrolls. The scent of old parchment and beeswax hangs in the air.

templates.name: The Gilded Bazaar
templates.description: A bustling market square where merchants under silk awnings hawk fine silks, rare spices, and blessed artifacts. Every transaction follows the Golden Code.

templates.name: Sanctuary of Mercy
templates.description: A gentle, sunlit hall where the wounded are tended to by acolytes of Valeros. The walls are adorned with tapestries of healing saints.

templates.name: The Pearl Mews
templates.description: Uniform facades of white stone line this quiet residential street. Each doorway is marked with a sun-emblem of the family residing within.

templates.name: Order's Bastion
templates.description: Heavy stone battlements overlook the Aetherian boundaries. Knights in polished steel armor stand watch with absolute focus.
